global_description: A medium-sized bird with a slender, elongated body. It features a smooth, brown upper body and a lighter underbelly. The bird has a distinctive black bill and red eye ring, with a long, graduated tail. The feathers are sleek and smooth.

part_details.bill: Short, slender, and black, slightly curved.
part_details.eye_ring: Thin, bright red circle around the eye.
part_details.tail: Long, tapered, with a slight graduation in feather length.
part_details.underbelly: Lighter, pale cream or white feathers.

spatial_relations: The black bill is positioned at the front of the head.
The red eye ring encircles the eye.
The long tail extends from the rear of the body.
